stories.title: Projecting the USMNT 2030 World Cup roster: 30 pla...
stories.summary: The tears are barely dry from the USMNT's 2026 World Cup exit, but the page immediately turns to the 2030 World Cup. Here's who could represent the U.S. in four years.

stories.title: McGregor to have surgery, plans to fight again
stories.summary: Conor McGregor will undergo surgery following his first-round loss to Max Holloway at UFC 329, and then he will fight again.

stories.title: Harper denies giving FanDuel consent for fan video...
stories.summary: Phillies star Bryce Harper said Monday that he did not know how FanDuel would use a personalized video he made for a customer, who has since accused the sportsbook in a lawsuit of taking advantage of his gambling addiction.

stories.title: Ex-Kansas player charged with attempted murder
stories.summary: Lagerald Vick, a member of the Kansas Jayhawks' Final Four basketball team in 2018, has been charged with attempted first-degree murder in Tennessee.

stories.title: Rams' Jackson won't face felony charge for arrest
stories.summary: The Rams' Alaric Jackson will not face a felony charge after he was arrested on a domestic violence charge in June, the Los Angeles County District Attorney's Office confirmed to ESPN.
